title: Crunchy Polish Carrot Stir-fry
description: An adventurous and fermented twist on classic Polish cuisine featuring a vibrant green salsa for added kick and crunchiness.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons fermented vegetables (e.g. kimchi or sauerkraut)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium heat.
Add finely diced onion and minced garlic, cooking until translucent.
Fold in shredded carrots and grated parmesan cheese; stir well to combine.
Deglaze the pan with lime juice, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Stir in finely chopped fermented vegetables (kimchi or sauerkraut), seasoning to taste with salt and pepper.
Cook until vegetables are tender and cheese is melted, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as a side dish or over keto-friendly bread for a meal.
